arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is a manager who likes to use a lot of visual aids to motivate his team. Indeed, we saw during Arsenal’s Amazon Prime...

arts.ttl: Chelsea and Manchester United interested in same player – Great quality and dynamism
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are one of the sides ‘interested’ in Flamengo youngster Lorran as he continues to rise in Brazil. That’s according to scout Marco Palma, who has this week appeared on Tuttomercatoweb radio and picked out the 18-year-old as one of two players to keep an eye on. The show was focused on The post Chelsea and Manchester United interested in same player – Great quality and dynamism appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Don’t rule them out – Mikel Arteta says Man City could still challenge for title
arts.sum: The Gunners host Ruben Amorim’s United nine points adrift of table-topping Liverpool, but two points clear of Pep Guardiola’s City.

arts.ttl: Here's what Pep Guardiola must learn from Sir Alex Ferguson about how to rescue Man City, writes IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: He offered a jocular reply about the local property market before declaring that managing in such a place would be 'not a problem. Not a problem at all.'

arts.ttl: Rochdale vs Manchester United U21 live National League Cup updates and how to watch information
arts.sum: Man Utd U21s play Rochdale in the English National League Cup on Tuesday and we'll bring you live updates.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs kick-off times are staggered this week
arts.sum: Tuesday night sees Ipswich Town take on Crystal Palace (7:30pm kick-off), Ruud van Nistelrooy makes his managerial debut for Leicester City against West Ham United at the King Power Stadium (8:15pm kick-off). Chelsea's game at Southampton kicks off at 7:30pm, while both Arsenal vs Man United and Bournemouth vs Southampton start at 8.15pm.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright calls out three Arsenal players who need to 'step up' ahead of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Arsenal legend Ian Wright insists Gabriel Jesus, Gabriel Martinelli and Raheem Sterling all need to step up and show their quality, ahead of the Premier League clash with Manchester United on Wednesday night. With such a jam-packed run of fixtures to come and a gap of nine points standing between the Gunners and leaders Liverpool, Wright has called upon the Arsenal trio to offer more for the club.

arts.ttl: Nwaneri starts, Martinelli call and Rice switch - Three Arsenal changes for Man Utd - Tom Canton - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal changed XI vs Man Utd: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Zinchenko, Rice, Odegaard, Nwaneri, Saka, Havertz, Martinelli Mikel Arteta has seen his side in response score 13 goals in three games and not without making changes or having to deal with further fitness issues.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives Bukayo Saka and Cristiano Ronaldo comparison verdict before Arsenal vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Those numbers leave him behind only Mohamed Salah in terms of goal involvements in the league this season, and Arteta admitted there has been a noticeable change in his game when asked at his press conference ahead of the Premier League clash against Manchester United . Arteta was asked about a comparison between the two, and whether Saka should be aiming to improve on the former Real Madrid legend's numbers in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Gabriel injury, Saka and Ronaldo comparisons and Amorim
arts.sum: If you want to do what we've done historically at this club you have to beat the big teams to win it at the end. It brings energy to a new club and the players which is always positive.
